title: campanula intercedens
intro: Campanula intercedens, also known as the intermediary bellflower, is a species of flowering plant in the family Campanulaceae. The plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Campanula intercedens include its potential to reduce inflammation and fight off infections, as well as its possible use in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Campanula intercedens typically involve infusions of the leaves and flowers, which can be consumed as teas or used in topical applications.
